hooks.template: (insert item) (insert fact), (insert complete opposite item) (insert similar fact).
hooks.text: Supplier got 200 dollars less. Not a scam. Middle banks took a cut.

hooks.template: If you don't have (insert item/action), do (insert item/action).
hooks.text: If your supplier says the money landed short, blame the middle banks.

hooks.template: Yesterday I was at (insert location) when I noticed something (insert adjective).
hooks.text: A business owner paid in full. Days later the supplier asked for 200 more.

hooks.template: My customer/client got (insert dream result) without (insert pain point).
hooks.text: Some business owners get the full amount to China without topping up later.

hooks.template: (insert big brand) didn't want to sponsor this video, let me show you what they're missing out on.
hooks.text: Your bank won't tell you this. Here is where the missing 200 went.
